nasb.text: Now, the acts of Asa from first to last, behold, they are written in the Book of the Kings of Judah and Israel.

esv.text: The acts of Asa, from first to last, are written in the Book of the Kings of Judah and Israel.

cnv.text: 亞撒所行的事蹟，一生的始末，都記在猶大和以色列諸王記上。

ccb.text: 亚撒其他的事自始至终都记在犹大和以色列的列王史上。
